project12pkg 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started with the Project 12 Package

Getting Started with the Project 12 Package

Source: vignettes/getting-started.Rmd
getting-started.Rmd
# Loading the Data
library(project12pkg)
data("example_sce", package = "project12pkg")
sce <- example_sce
sce
#> Loading required namespace: SingleCellExperiment
#> class: SingleCellExperiment 
#> dim: 14878 1886 
#> metadata(0):
#> assays(1): counts
#> rownames(14878): X0610007P14Rik X0610009B22Rik ... Zzz3 l7Rn6
#> rowData names(0):
#> colnames(1886): mouse1_lib1.final_cell_0001 mouse1_lib1.final_cell_0002
#>   ... mouse2_lib3.final_cell_0394 mouse2_lib3.final_cell_0395
#> colData names(2): strain label
#> reducedDimNames(0):
#> mainExpName: NULL
#> altExpNames(0):
#First, filter and remove the low expression genes that are detected in less than 5% of the cells from the dataset
sce_filt <- filter_genes(sce, min_detect_rate = 0.05)
sce_filt
#> class: SingleCellExperiment 
#> dim: 7838 1886 
#> metadata(0):
#> assays(1): counts
#> rownames(7838): X0610007P14Rik X0610009B22Rik ... Zzz3 l7Rn6
#> rowData names(0):
#> colnames(1886): mouse1_lib1.final_cell_0001 mouse1_lib1.final_cell_0002
#>   ... mouse2_lib3.final_cell_0394 mouse2_lib3.final_cell_0395
#> colData names(2): strain label
#> reducedDimNames(0):
#> mainExpName: NULL
#> altExpNames(0):
#Next, compute log-normalized counts
mat_norm <- normalize_counts(sce_filt)
dim(mat_norm)
#> [1] 7838 1886
# Perform one-vs-rest statistical testing for each cell type.
all_markers <- find_markers(sce_filt, mat_norm)
head(all_markers)
#>                          gene cell_type      log2fc detect_target detect_rest
#> X0610007P14Rik X0610007P14Rik      beta -0.21803103    0.09284116  0.11491935
#> X0610009B22Rik X0610009B22Rik      beta  0.23481797    0.15548098  0.11895161
#> X0610009O20Rik X0610009O20Rik      beta  0.17077622    0.07718121  0.05040323
#> X0610010F05Rik X0610010F05Rik      beta  0.23063519    0.07494407  0.03931452
#> X0610011F06Rik X0610011F06Rik      beta  0.43174091    0.23042506  0.16633065
#> X0610012G03Rik X0610012G03Rik      beta -0.05099588    0.20469799  0.19758065
#>                      pvalue        padj
#> X0610007P14Rik 0.9602843122 1.000000000
#> X0610009B22Rik 0.0219508421 0.085089367
#> X0610009O20Rik 0.0116435906 0.048960549
#> X0610010F05Rik 0.0006157989 0.003377629
#> X0610011F06Rik 0.0016972666 0.008610470
#> X0610012G03Rik 0.6445994789 1.000000000
#Next, extract the top markers from each cell type.
top_markers <- select_top_markers(all_markers, n_markers = 5)
top_markers
#>                gene          cell_type    log2fc detect_target detect_rest
#> G6pc2         G6pc2               beta  7.486434     0.8176734 0.085685484
#> Prss53       Prss53               beta  7.466877     0.8366890 0.059475806
#> Ero1lb       Ero1lb               beta  6.675721     0.8411633 0.136088710
#> Prlr           Prlr               beta  6.157671     0.7259508 0.061491935
#> Bace2         Bace2               beta  5.730954     0.7919463 0.183467742
#> Clu1            Clu             ductal  8.679141     0.9563636 0.443823712
#> Zfp36l11    Zfp36l1             ductal  8.172201     0.8654545 0.112352576
#> Cldn41        Cldn4             ductal  7.936358     0.9309091 0.268156425
#> Krt81          Krt8             ductal  7.808051     1.0000000 0.529484792
#> Flna1          Flna             ductal  7.610547     0.8800000 0.176908752
#> Sst2            Sst              delta  9.110696     1.0000000 0.830935252
#> Rbp42          Rbp4              delta  8.988304     0.9357798 0.205035971
#> Pyy2            Pyy              delta  7.771244     1.0000000 0.694844125
#> Gpx32          Gpx3              delta  6.149514     0.9266055 0.402877698
#> Cd24a2        Cd24a              delta  6.032118     0.7798165 0.185251799
#> Vim3            Vim            schwann 12.007495     1.0000000 0.121276596
#> Cryab3        Cryab            schwann 10.085439     1.0000000 0.054787234
#> Msn3            Msn            schwann  8.734810     1.0000000 0.216489362
#> Serpine13  Serpine1            schwann  8.612626     1.0000000 0.148936170
#> Gpc13          Gpc1            schwann  8.566139     1.0000000 0.050531915
#> Igfbp54      Igfbp5 quiescent_stellate 11.818868     0.9574468 0.042414356
#> Gm138894    Gm13889 quiescent_stellate 11.563392     1.0000000 0.029907558
#> Ednrb4        Ednrb quiescent_stellate 10.320134     1.0000000 0.057096248
#> Mgp4            Mgp quiescent_stellate 10.059843     0.7872340 0.046220772
#> Rgs54          Rgs5 quiescent_stellate  9.548018     0.8936170 0.040783034
#> Cdh55          Cdh5        endothelial 10.728269     0.9712230 0.004579279
#> Pecam15      Pecam1        endothelial 10.691775     0.9856115 0.010875787
#> Flt15          Flt1        endothelial 10.556742     0.9424460 0.008586148
#> Sparc5        Sparc        endothelial 10.472022     0.9640288 0.123640527
#> Egfl75        Egfl7        endothelial 10.307233     0.9784173 0.015455066
#> Ppy6            Ppy              gamma 10.394362     1.0000000 0.742005420
#> Pyy6            Pyy              gamma  8.737428     1.0000000 0.724119241
#> Ace26          Ace2              gamma  6.887504     0.8048780 0.047696477
#> Ugt2b346    Ugt2b34              gamma  5.839056     0.7560976 0.139295393
#> Tmem276      Tmem27              gamma  5.414853     0.9268293 0.491056911
#> Gcg7            Gcg              alpha 10.125562     1.0000000 0.803539823
#> Ttr7            Ttr              alpha 10.083582     1.0000000 0.382890855
#> Gpx37          Gpx3              alpha  8.651587     1.0000000 0.402949853
#> Rbp47          Rbp4              alpha  6.474138     0.8848168 0.222418879
#> Tmem277      Tmem27              alpha  6.068789     0.9371728 0.451327434
#> Cd748          Cd74         macrophage 13.621079     1.0000000 0.036756757
#> Apoe8          Apoe         macrophage 12.913914     1.0000000 0.052432432
#> Lgals38      Lgals3         macrophage 10.988453     1.0000000 0.073513514
#> C1qa8          C1qa         macrophage  9.868626     0.9722222 0.087027027
#> Srgn8          Srgn         macrophage  9.583540     0.9444444 0.075135135
#> Fscn19        Fscn1       immune_other 11.927130     1.0000000 0.066560170
#> Ramp39        Ramp3       immune_other 10.861646     1.0000000 0.065495208
#> Cd749          Cd74       immune_other 10.838628     1.0000000 0.051118211
#> Tmem1239    Tmem123       immune_other 10.777814     1.0000000 0.200212993
#> Cnn29          Cnn2       immune_other  9.701460     1.0000000 0.080937167
#> Sparc10       Sparc activated_stellate 11.007527     1.0000000 0.179487179
#> Vim10           Vim activated_stellate 10.832566     1.0000000 0.117521368
#> Serpinh110 Serpinh1 activated_stellate  9.771146     1.0000000 0.190705128
#> Cald110       Cald1 activated_stellate  9.296747     1.0000000 0.164529915
#> Ifitm310     Ifitm3 activated_stellate  8.862743     0.9285714 0.133547009
#> Cd7411         Cd74             B_cell 11.691753     0.9000000 0.050639659
#> B2m11           B2m             B_cell  7.805571     1.0000000 0.492004264
#> Shisa511     Shisa5             B_cell  7.695550     1.0000000 0.372068230
#> Sh3bgrl311 Sh3bgrl3             B_cell  6.634023     0.9000000 0.267590618
#> Ly6e11         Ly6e             B_cell  6.261384     1.0000000 0.552771855
#> Srgn12         Srgn             T_cell  8.675560     0.8571429 0.088877062

#> B2m12           B2m             T_cell  7.727236     1.0000000 0.492815327
#> Ramp312       Ramp3             T_cell  7.388685     0.7142857 0.067056945
#>                   pvalue          padj
#> G6pc2      1.540210e-230 3.018042e-227
#> Prss53     2.175223e-247 5.683131e-244
#> Ero1lb     8.317780e-209 1.303895e-205

#> Gm138894   6.043339e-195 4.736769e-191
#> Ednrb4     9.733873e-129 1.907352e-125
#> Mgp4        1.712784e-98  2.237466e-95
#> Rgs54      1.066296e-133 2.785875e-130

#> Pecam15     0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00
#> Flt15       0.000000e+00  0.000000e+00

#> Ppy6        1.290489e-28  3.371616e-25

#> Ace26       1.673168e-89  1.311429e-85
#> Ugt2b346    9.702174e-32  3.802282e-28
#> Tmem276     3.338628e-16  2.180681e-13
#> Gcg7       5.898682e-114 5.779234e-111
#> Ttr7       6.676991e-132 1.046685e-128
#> Gpx37      2.462969e-124 3.217458e-121
#> Rbp47       7.163296e-73  3.509120e-70
#> Tmem277     2.407037e-77  1.347597e-74
#> Cd748      4.984906e-148 3.907169e-144
#> Apoe8      1.116808e-118 4.376769e-115
#> Lgals38     2.479248e-92  6.477448e-89
#> C1qa8       2.066719e-78  2.699823e-75
#> Srgn8       1.592899e-75  1.560642e-72
#> Fscn19      5.806126e-28  2.275421e-24
#> Ramp39      1.037823e-27  2.711486e-24
#> Cd749       2.998840e-32  2.350490e-28
#> Tmem1239    1.969100e-12  7.716904e-10
#> Cnn29       2.721650e-23  5.333073e-20
#> Sparc10     4.291090e-20  2.587197e-17
#> Vim10       6.353293e-28  9.959422e-25
#> Serpinh110  3.582453e-20  2.339939e-17
#> Cald110     2.667545e-21  2.323135e-18
#> Ifitm310    9.847053e-21  7.016473e-18
#> Cd7411      1.807066e-33  1.416378e-29
#> B2m11       6.570084e-08  2.238970e-05
#> Shisa511    5.191804e-09  4.521485e-06
#> Sh3bgrl311  1.683830e-08  1.099822e-05
#> Ly6e11      4.121196e-07  6.094705e-05
#> Srgn12      1.800934e-13  7.057859e-10
#> Ets112      2.107599e-10  4.129840e-07
#> Celf212     2.398339e-08  2.349773e-05
#> B2m12       6.305073e-06  2.246326e-03
#> Ramp312     1.581625e-12  4.132259e-09
#Computer summary statistics across cell types
marker_summary <- summarize_markers(all_markers)
marker_summary
#>                             cell_type n_sig top_marker
#> beta                             beta   557      G6pc2
#> ductal                         ductal  1194        Clu
#> delta                           delta   349        Sst
#> schwann                       schwann  3584        Vim
#> quiescent_stellate quiescent_stellate   840     Igfbp5
#> endothelial               endothelial  1043       Cdh5
#> gamma                           gamma   488        Ppy
#> alpha                           alpha   451        Gcg
#> macrophage                 macrophage   765       Cd74
#> immune_other             immune_other  1083      Fscn1
#> activated_stellate activated_stellate  1242      Sparc
#> B_cell                         B_cell   856       Cd74
#> T_cell                         T_cell   730       Srgn
# Build a marker plot where color = mean expression, and size = detection rate
cell_type <- SummarizedExperiment::colData(sce_filt)[["label"]]

plot_df <- build_dotplot(all_markers, top_markers, mat_norm, cell_type)

plot_markers(plot_df)

#Finally, export the results
output_dir <- tempdir()
export_markers(all_markers, marker_summary, output_dir)

list.files(output_dir)
#>  [1] "file79201a5f316c"               "file79202282214d"              
#>  [3] "file79202bd039d3"               "file79202c0a7549"              
#>  [5] "file792040b2b02"                "file792044b567b0"              
#>  [7] "file792045a54e6"                "file79204d83575f"              
#>  [9] "marker_genes.tsv"               "marker_summary.tsv"            
#> [11] "Rf792071875d82"                 "rmarkdown-str79202e4f3e35.html"
